scripts.test: npm run test --workspaces --if-present && npm run dev:ha:tools:test && pytest -q tests
scripts.dev:ha:pair: npm --workspace packages/client run build && node dev/home-assistant/tools/ha-varco.mjs pair
scripts.dev:ha:smoke: npm --workspace packages/client run build && node dev/home-assistant/tools/ha-varco.mjs smoke
scripts.dev:ha:local-smoke: npm --workspace packages/client run build && node dev/home-assistant/tools/ha-varco.mjs local-smoke
scripts.dev:ha:gazzetta-demo: npm --workspace packages/client run build && npm --workspace examples/gazzetta-energy-showcase run build && node dev/home-assistant/tools/prepare-gazzetta-demo.mjs && npm --workspace examples/gazzetta-energy-showcase run build
